name: GOLFTEC Lakewood
address: 12077 W Alameda Pkwy Suite G3, Lakewood, CO 80228
about: GOLFTEC Lakewood is a golf training and club fitting facility that uses technology and coaching to help players improve. The center provides a professional environment with indoor bays equipped with launch monitors, video analysis, and swing tracking tools. Services include personalized lessons, custom club fittings, and practice memberships with access to advanced training technology. Pricing is structured around membership plans and individual services like the $95 Swing Evaluation, with a focus on long-term improvement.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced launch monitor and video technology for detailed swing analysis
Personalized coaching and custom club fitting services
Professional environment focused on measurable improvement
Flexible membership plans for consistent practice
Junior programs with discounted rates for youth golfers

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, but GOLFTEC also provides club rentals and offers custom club fitting services with equipment from top brands.

faq.question: Can I bring food or drinks?
faq.answer: The website does not mention food or drink services, so it's recommended to check with the center directly for their policies outside items.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulation take?
faq.answer: The website does not specify exact timing for 18-hole simulations, but typical indoor golf sessions can vary based on player pace and group size.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC Lakewood offers youth golf lessons with 30% off for juniors under 18 and has certified coaches trained to work with young golfers.
